name: mia-commit-chart
description: Standalone HTML commit activity chart generator for a local Git repository.

scripts.chart: node generate-commit-chart.js --repo . --branch main --out mia-commit-chart.html --title "mia-platform commit activity"
scripts.smoke: node --check generate-commit-chart.js && node generate-commit-chart.js --repo . --branch main --out /tmp/deus-commit-chart-smoke.html --title "Smoke chart"
